payload.req: How should TASK_TYPE_A be handled in future runs?
payload.resp: For TASK_TYPE_A, avoid TOOL_ALPHA; keep TOOL_PREF_Y under RULE_X as the standing constraint.
payload.memory_candidate: For TASK_TYPE_A, avoid TOOL_ALPHA; keep TOOL_PREF_Y under RULE_X as the standing constraint.
payload.memory_form_description: Standing restriction memory phrased as a guardrail.
